name: WF-300 Context Engineering Pack Canonical
description: Runs context engineering lane: execution context → platform packaging → asset briefs → lineage validation.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, dossier_context: { dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', pack: 'WF-300', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(), route: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_STANDARD', script_finalized: !!$json.final_script_packet } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, pack_context: { child_workflows: ['CWF-310-execution-context-builder', 'CWF-320-platform-packager', 'CWF-330-asset-brief-generator', 'CWF-340-lineage-validator'], primary_director: 'Krishna', strategic_authority: 'Krishna', governance_authority: ['Yama', 'Kubera'] } } }];

phase2_chaining.notes: Chain runs all children BEFORE Pack Validation. Capture nodes preserve sub-workflow outputs as cwfXXX_result fields.
